Name: sapdme_nonconformance
Title: Nonconformance
ShortText: Manage nonconformances as part of quality checks
ChangeLog: [{"date":"16 Nov 2025","notes":"Description clarified for POST sfcs/disposition endpoint.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"30 May 2025","notes":" Make correction get nonconformances API V2 - in response change type for 'code' property;add id to response; change operationId for correct ui behavior.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"18 May 2025","notes":"Adding comments field to open/close nonconformance incidents requests. V2 version is provided from get nonconformances API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"16 Feb 2025","notes":"Retrieve nonconformance hierarchies API was added. The 'componentSfc' field in the retrieval nonconformance list API response was deprecated.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"11 Feb 2023","notes":"The log non-conformance API is extended by adding incident id to response. The log non-conformance API is extended by adding primary non-conformance Id to request for log secondary code. The read nonconformances API is extended by adding incident id to response.  Add open/close nonconformance API. The log non-conformance API is extended by adding process lot number filed to request. The validation logic for the component data field has been added to the log nonconformance API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"12 Nov 2022","notes":"The routing step ID added to the API request when the nonconformance was logged.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 Aug 2022","notes":"The retrieval nonconformance list API was enhanced to return nonconformance data fields.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"13 Nov 2021","notes":"The partial nonconformance logging and auto split at disposition was added and the resource was made optional for Log Nonconformance and SFC Disposition APIs.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"22 May 2021","notes":"The nonconformance API is extended by SFC disposition.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"15 Aug 2020","notes":"The log non-conformance API is extended by an ability to attach files.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"14 Feb 2020","notes":"First version","state":"Active","version":"v1"}]
